title: M&G GASPARD ET LISA CORRECTION TAPE 10M X 5MM
subtitle: M&G GASPARD ET LISA
overview: Product Introduction The M&G x Gaspard et Lisa Love Shape Correction Tape brings together charm and convenience with its whimsical heart-shaped design. Each tape dispenser holds 10 meters of 5mm-wide correction tape, providing strong coverage and a tear-proof finish for flawless results. Its comfortable side-action applicator allows for effortless use and smooth, precise corrections. Built with a durable rolling wheel mechanism, this correction tape resists scratching while ensuring a seamless, clean application—making it perfect for everyday note-taking, journaling, or schoolwork.
